ideas.title: Fix the auto-revert conflict wedge (snapshot-restore instead of blind revert)
ideas.why: needs-review.md shows FOUR consecutive 'auto-revert … CONFLICTED — needs human' entries in one day, so the self-healing loop's core safety net is silently broken and stranding red commits on main.

ideas.title: ⌘K command palette for search, navigation, and post discovery
ideas.why: the site has a real content index but no fast content-discovery affordance, and a palette (the Linear/Vercel pattern, explicitly allowed vs the banned terminal) is the single interaction that makes an engineering blog feel like a destination.

ideas.title: Explorable live factory graph: clickable nodes drilling into real router/CI/spark data
ideas.why: the strongest HN signal pairs local-LLM showcases with personal-data interactive viz (pilot flight globes, isometric.nyc), and this repo already serves brain.json + knowledge-graph viz that are currently static rather than drill-downable.

ideas.title: 'Watch a task run locally' tape: live token/GPU-util stream from the DGX Spark nodes
ideas.why: router shows only 5 spark tasks today vs 325 cloud_hard while both GB10 nodes sit at 0% util — a real-time replay of a task running on local silicon would both showcase and drive the underused local-first inference HN obsession (needs a small polling/WS backend).

ideas.title: RSS/JSON-feed autodiscovery + sitemap link in <head>
ideas.why: posts.json and a sitemap already exist but the 261-commits/7d content stream ships no <link rel=alternate> autodiscovery, the discovery pattern every feed reader and Google expects (borrowed from Simon Willison's blog).

ideas.title: Add a regression test for the revert/self-heal path
ideas.why: coverage_fns is only 6 and the repeatedly-conflicting auto-revert has no test guarding it, so the one function that protects main is itself unverified.
